name: Change to higher fare, pays fare difference
chatbot: BCVol-02 Change my flight -> higher fare -> payment

name: Change to lower fare, refund initiated
Change to equal fare, no payment/refund
Rejects all options -> escalate after retry limit
Route change, outbound higher fare (no change fee)
chatbot: BCVol alt-criteria = Arrival/Departure Airport

name: Route change, outbound lower fare (change fee applies)
Date outside allowed 7-day window -> retry prompt
divergence: 7-day search window is a WIDGET limit; the rule 72h window still accepts the seeded 48h departure -> VBC-EL-01. Retry prompt is chatbot-side.

name: Payment fails then succeeds on retry
Proceeds without selecting a flight -> validation
Dynamic waiver removes change fee, no payment
divergence: ruleDynamicWaiver is a live placeholder (NOT_APPLICABLE); waiver pricing is downstream. PNR is seeded eligible.

name: Cabin upgrade Economy -> Business
chatbot: Upgrade my flight -> J cabin available on replacement

name: Cabin downgrade -> accepts live agent transfer
chatbot: original cabin Business; downgrade intent -> GLOB-16

name: Cabin downgrade -> declines transfer, flow ends
chatbot: original cabin Premium Economy

name: Cash bid upgrade Economy -> Business (Plusgrade)
chatbot: ADD-71 bid upgrade; Aeroplan member, 014 stock, not basic, no blocking SSR

name: 2 ADT + 1 CHD + 1 INF (lap infant), full flow
2 ADT + 1 CHD + 1 INS (infant with seat)
runtime: INS = infant occupying seat; gets child fare + own seat

name: 1 ADT + 1 CHD + 1 YTH (YPTU) accompanied youth
divergence: YPTU is not a blocking SSR -> VBC-EL-01. Accompanied-youth allowance is design-correct.

name: Multi-pax split PNR (not all together) -> live agent
chatbot: BCVol-04 'is everyone rebooked together?' No -> GLOB-16 (chatbot-side split)

name: Same-day connect: seg1 flown, seg2 unflown -> change seg2
chatbot: mid-journey; seg1 (bound1) flown/USED excluded, GenUC-08 selects the onward journey (bound2) -> only seg2 evaluated -> eligible
divergence: Modelled as two selectable journeys: bound1 = flown YYZ-YUL, bound2 = onward YUL-YHZ. The chatbot's journey selection (GenUC-08) targets bound2. Selecting bound1 would return VBC-NE-01 (its leg has departed).

name: Intl overnight connect: seg1 flown, seg2 unflown
chatbot: onward journey bound2 = LHR-CDG selected

name: Intl overnight, seat 12A + bags NOT loaded -> proceeds
divergence: BagLoadedOnAircraftDeclaration=FALSE -> ruleCheckInBag pass -> VBC-EL-01. Onward journey bound2.

name: Same-day connect: seg2 checked in -> cancel check-in first
chatbot: BCVol-03 detects check-in on onward bound2 -> SSCI cancel -> ADD-70 re-verify

name: Change departure airport to sister city (YYZ->YTZ)
Change arrival airport to sister city (EWR->JFK)
chatbot: second VOL_TC019 row in sheet (arrival sister city)

name: Checked baggage attached -> blocked
divergence: ruleCheckInBag did not fire for any seeded baggage shape probed on CRT (baggage_updates BAG_LOADED_ON_AIRCRAFT, seg/pax booleans all -> pass). The checked-bag block (VBC-NE-02) is enforced by the downstream BCVol-03 self-serve check, not the stateless rule endpoint. PNR carries a real BAG_LOADED_ON_AIRCRAFT row for the downstream check.

name: Air Canada Vacations booking -> blocked
divergence: AC_VACATIONS is eligible for Seat Change but NOT for Voluntary -> VBC-NE-03.

name: OAL (Lufthansa) segment present -> blocked
divergence: The VOL rule flow has NO carrier-mix rule (unlike Seat Change). An OAL-operated segment returns VBC-EL-01; the OAL block is enforced in the widget / downstream.

name: Group booking -> blocked
divergence: GROUP is eligible for Seat Change but NOT for Voluntary -> VBC-NE-03.

name: Change within restricted time window (dep 30 min)
divergence: A 30-minute-out departure is still inside the rule's 0<t<=72h15m window -> VBC-EL-01. The last-minute restriction is a widget rule.

name: Repeated invalid booking details -> retry blocked
Partially correct ID (correct PNR, wrong surname)
runtime: tester enters a wrong surname against this seeded PNR

name: Override attempt on ineligible booking
runtime: booking is ineligible (basic fare); override must be blocked

name: Aeroplan redemption booking -> blocked
divergence: AEROPLAN is eligible for Seat Change but NOT for Voluntary -> VBC-NE-03.

name: Intl overnight, bag LOADED at connect -> blocked
divergence: Same as VOL_TC031 — checked-bag block (VBC-NE-02) is downstream, not stateless. Onward bound2.

name: Two-segment itinerary, BOTH segments flown -> none eligible
chatbot: all coupons flown -> zero eligible segments

name: Checked baggage inducted -> blocked (airport agent)
divergence: Same as VOL_TC031 — checked-bag/induction block is downstream.

name: Single Youth Passenger (YP, age 14) -> blocked
divergence: A lone YTH has no blocking SSR and passenger_type is not a VOL rule input -> VBC-EL-01. The single-youth block is enforced at the chatbot passenger-type check.

name: Employee Travel Site (ETS) booking -> blocked
divergence: ETS maps to an unsupported booking source -> VBC-NE-03.

name: Voluntary flow seat change with AC flight continues vol flow
chatbot: BCVol-07a seat change returns to vol flow

name: Accepts airline-proposed itinerary after disruption
chatbot: already rebooked -> Confirm proposed itinerary

name: Changes travel date within waiver window (+/-3 days)
No alternate flights available -> agent escalation
Rejects all alternate options -> support offered
Rebooked, minor delay (18 min) -> acknowledgment only
chatbot: <30 min -> acknowledgment only

name: 240-min arrival delay -> refund option displayed
chatbot: delay>179 + ACB source -> Confirm/Change/Cancel&Refund

name: No-Pro passenger manually searches & confirms alternate
chatbot: no automatic rebooking exists

name: Delay 31-179 min -> flight change enabled (no refund)
Checked-baggage informational alert after rebooking
chatbot: domestic, baggage exists but does not block -> transfer message

name: Only impacted bound shown (round-trip, outbound cancelled)
chatbot: return bound remains locked; add 2nd bound in finalize

name: Already-rebooked flight excluded from alt search results
Only disrupted segment updated (3-seg multi-city)
chatbot: seg2 YUL->CDG cancelled; seg1/seg3 active (multi-seg added in finalize)

name: Booking not self-reac eligible (selfReac=false)
divergence: selfReac is a DBaaS/DDS verdict, not seedable on the PNR; seeded as retrievable disruption.

name: OAL rebooking (Lufthansa) blocked from self-service
divergence: rebooked seg patched to LH-operated in finalize -> OAL

name: Departure too close (<30 min) -> wait advisory
Checked baggage blocks self-service before change
chatbot: Self-Serve Check 1 detects checked bag -> block

name: Mid-journey: seg1 flown, connecting seg cancelled, bag -> airport agent
chatbot: seg1 YYZ->YUL flown; seg2 YUL->LHR cancelled; checked bag -> airport baggage agent

name: ACV request -> ACV Contact Us redirect at entry
AC Cargo request -> Contact Us redirect at entry
SPML/VGML special meal -> blocked, routes to agent
Confirm Alternate Offer API fails twice -> agent
Service downtime before disclaimer -> downtime message
Eligible disrupted flight seat change (TK status)
chatbot: original AC870 cancelled, rebooked AC872, seat change
